title: Bridge Essay: Neural correlates of nondual awareness in meditation.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.
**Phase context:** Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, non-self in neuroscience.

**Neural correlates of nondual awareness in meditation.** — Ann N Y Acad Sci (2014). DOI: 10.1111/nyas.12261. PMID: 24033505. Dualities such as self versus other, good versus bad, and in-group versus out-group are pervasive features of human experience, structuring the majority of cognitive and affective processes. Yet, an entirely different way of experiencing, one in which such dualities are relaxed rather than fortified, is also available.
